name: William Shakespeare

gold_answer: William Shakespeare had three children: Susanna, and twins Hamnet and Judith.

name: William Shakespeare

gold_answer: The First Folio, published in 1623, is considered the most definitive collection of his plays.

name: William Shakespeare

gold_answer: John Heminges and Henry Condell, fellow actors and friends of Shakespeare, were the editors of the First Folio.

name: William Shakespeare
question: What genres did William Shakespeare explore in his final phase of writing?
gold_answer: In his final phase, he wrote tragicomedies, also known as romances, and collaborated with other playwrights.

name: William Shakespeare
question: When is believed William Shakespeare retired to Stratford-upon-Avon?
gold_answer: He is believed to have retired around 1613, at the age of 49.
